subtitle: Review scope edges, actors, done criteria, and early approval calls before downstream specs branch out.

sections.title: Goals and Non-Goals
sections.label: Scope Edge
sections.why: Lead with intended outcomes and explicit exclusions in one scan.

sections.title: Actors and Personas in Scope
sections.label: Actors
sections.why: Make the named people, roles, or systems shaping scope obvious.

sections.title: Success Criteria that Define Done
sections.label: Done Criteria
sections.why: Frame approval as explicit done checks, not loose aspirations.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: Keep approval calls dense and scan-fast.

sections.title: Scope Risks and Open Questions
sections.label: Open Issues
sections.why: Keep risky edges and unresolved framing visible.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may now treat as fixed.

glance_cards.label: Scope edges
glance_cards.hint: Goals and exclusions called out explicitly.

glance_cards.label: Actors
glance_cards.hint: Named actors or personas shaping downstream work.

glance_cards.label: Done checks
glance_cards.hint: Success criteria the reviewer should confirm.

glance_cards.label: Decision gates
glance_cards.hint: Explicit approvals needed to lock scope.

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
glance_cards.hint: Claims backed by exact charter quotes.
